at0002.1.description: Default, unspecified point in time or interval event which may be explicitly defined in a template or at run-time.

at0025.1.description: Additional narrative about the implanted device, not captured in other fields.

at0000.description: Series of questions and associated answers used to screen for the presence of implanted medical devices or use of assistive aids.

at0002.description: Default, unspecified point in time or interval event which may be explicitly defined in a template or at run-time.

at0004.description: Name of the implanted medical device or device type being screened.

at0021.description: Additional information required to extend the model with local content or to align with other reference models or formalisms.
at0021.comment: For example: local information requirements; or additional metadata to align with FHIR.

at0022.description: Screening details about the presence of a specific implanted medical device.
at0022.comment: For example: cochlear implant; pacemaker; joint replacement; heart valve; coronary stent; bone fixation device eg screws or plates; deep brain stimulator; intraocular lens; or contraceptive device.

at0023.description: The specific device is present or being used.

at0024.description: The specific device is not present or being used.

at0025.description: Additional narrative about the implanted device, not captured in other fields.

at0027.description: It is not known whether the device is present or absent.

at0034.comment: For example: screening prior to a Magnetic Resonance Imaging examination.

at0039.description: Additional details or questions about the implanted device.

at0040.description: Narrative description about the implanted device.

at0041.description: Screening details about the use of a specific assistive medical device.
at0041.comment: For example: wheelchair; walking stick; hearing aid; reading glasses; prosthetic limb; braille reader; speech generating device or medication organiser.

at0042.description: Name of the medical device or device type being screened.

at0044.description: The specific device is present or being used.

at0045.description: The specific device is not present or being used.

at0046.description: It is not known whether the device is present or absent.

at0047.description: Narrative description about the assistive aid.

at0048.description: Additional details or questions about the assistive aid.

at0049.description: Additional narrative about the assistive aid, not captured in other fields.

at0050.description: Indication of timing related to the implanted device.
at0050.comment: The 'Timing' data element has deliberately been loosely modelled to support the myriad of ways that it can be used in questionnaires to capture when a medical device was implanted. The specific and intended semantics can be further clarified in a template. For example: the actual date and/or time; the dates when the implant was inserted or removed; the interval of time during which the implant was inserted; the implant duration; the age of the individual at the time the implant was inserted; or the duration of time since it was inserted or removed. A partial date is valid, using the DV_DATE_TIME data type, to record only a year.

at0004.1.description: Name of the implanted medical device or device type being screened.

at0040.1.description: Narrative description about the implanted device.

at0041.1.description: Screening details about the use of a specific assistive medical device.
at0041.1.comment: For example: wheelchair; walking stick; hearing aid; reading glasses; prosthetic limb; braille reader; speech generating device or medication organiser.

at0050.1.description: Indication of timing related to the implanted device.
at0050.1.comment: The 'Timing' data element has deliberately been loosely modelled to support the myriad of ways that it can be used in questionnaires to capture when a medical device was implanted. The specific and intended semantics can be further clarified in a template. For example: the actual date and/or time; the dates when the implant was inserted or removed; the interval of time during which the implant was inserted; the implant duration; the age of the individual at the time the implant was inserted; or the duration of time since it was inserted or removed. A partial date is valid, using the DV_DATE_TIME data type, to record only a year.

at0000.1.description: Series of questions and associated answers used to screen for the presence of implanted medical devices or use of assistive aids.

at0034.1.comment: For example: screening prior to a Magnetic Resonance Imaging examination.

at0022.1.description: Screening details about the presence of a specific implanted medical device.
at0022.1.comment: For example: cochlear implant; pacemaker; joint replacement; heart valve; coronary stent; bone fixation device eg screws or plates; deep brain stimulator; intraocular lens; or contraceptive device.

at0000.description: Serie med spørsmål og tilhørende svar som brukes for å kartlegge tilstedeværelse av implanterte medisinske enheter eller bruk av hjelpemidler.

at0002.description: Standard, uspesifisert tidspunkt eller tidsintervall som kan defineres mer eksplisitt i et templat eller i en applikasjon.

at0004.description: Navn på implantert medisinsk utstyr det kartlegges for.

at0021.description: Ytterligere informasjon som trengs for å kunne registrere lokalt definert innhold eller for å tilpasse til andre referansemodeller/formalismer.
at0021.comment: For eksempel lokale informasjonsbehov eller ytterligere metadata for å kunne tilpasse til tilsvarende konsepter i FHIR.

at0022.description: Detaljer om tilstedeværelsen av spesifikt implantert medisinsk utstyr.
at0022.comment: For eksempel: cochleaimplantat, pacemaker, leddprotese, hjerteklaff, koronarstent, benfiksasjonsutstyr, f.eks. skruer eller plater, dyp hjernestimulator, intraokulærlinse eller prevensjonsinnretning.

at0023.description: Utstyr er tilstede eller blir brukt.

at0024.description: Utstyr er ikke tilstede eller blir ikke brukt.

at0025.description: Ytterligere fritekst om det spesifikke medisinske implantatet som ikke er omfattet av andre felt.

at0027.description: Det er ikke kjent om utstyr er tilstede eller blir brukt.

at0034.comment: For eksempel sjekkliste forut for MR-undersøkelse.

at0039.description: Strukturerte detaljer om det medisinske implantatet.

at0040.description: Fritekstbeskrivelse om det implanterte medisinske utstyret som er innenfor kartleggingsformålet.

at0041.description: Kartlegging om bruke av medisinske hjelpemidler.
at0041.comment: For eksempel: rullestol, stokk, høreapparat, lesebriller, protese, punktskriftleser, talegenererende enhet eller medisinorganisator/dosett.

at0044.description: Hjelpemidlet er tilstede eller blir brukt.

at0045.description: Hjelpemidlet er ikke tilstede eller blir ikke brukt.

at0046.description: Det er ikke kjent om hjelpemidlet er tilstede eller blir brukt.

at0047.description: Fritekstbeskrivelse om hjelpemidlet som er innenfor kartleggingsformålet.

at0049.description: Ytterligere fritekst om hjelpemidelt som ikke er omfattet av andre felt.

at0050.description: Tidsangivelse relatert til det implanterte medisinske utstyret.
at0050.comment: Dataelementet "Tidsangivelse" er med hensikt løst modellert for å støtte ulike måter å angi tidsangivelser for symptomet eller sykdomstegnet i et spørreskjema. Den konkrete semantikken defineres i templatet. For eksempel: Symptomet eller sykdomstegnet faktiske dato og/eller klokkeslett, start- og sluttid for symptomet eller sykdomstegnet, et tidsintervall for når for symptomet eller sykdomstegnet oppstod, varigheten for symptomet eller sykdomstegnet, individets alder på tidspunktet symptomet eller sykdomstegnet oppstod, eller hvor lenge det siden det oppstod. Kan være en deldato, for eksempel bare år, ved å bruke datatypen DV_DATE_TIME.

at0052.description: Det er usikkert om utstyr er tilstede eller blir brukt.

at0053.description: Det er usikkert om hjelpemidlet er tilstede eller blir brukt.
